title: existence check in update_contact_fully fetches column data unnecessarily
description: SELECT id FROM chat_contact WHERE id = ? returns the actual id string into a (String,) tuple just to check whether the row exists. The id data is never used — only the Some/None result of fetch_optional. More idiomatic: SELECT 1 FROM chat_contact WHERE id = ? with fetch_optional::<(i32,)>, or SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM chat_contact WHERE id = ?) with fetch_one::<(bool,)>. Current code works correctly but fetches and allocates a String that is immediately discarded.
close_reason: Fixed in store.rs: panic for precondition, exhaustive-match test, SELECT 1 for existence check; decision records filed
